Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: youth (people) [300025944], people by age group [300154396], people (agents) [300024979], People (hierarchy name) [300024978], Agents Facet [300264089]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: People in the earliest developmental stage of life.
Gente en la etapa temprana de desarrollo de vida.
Mensen die zich in de eerste ontwikkelingsfase van het leven bevinden.
指處於人生中最早發展階段的人。
Pessoas nos primeiros estágios de desenvolvimento da vida.
Macehualli tlen nocca cuecuetzin huan zanoc mozcaltia pan inemiliz.

Source.Source_ID: 2000054725/中央研究院中英雙語知識本體詞網

Term_Source.Page: 102 cihuapil, cihuapilmeh; 349 oquichpil, oquichpipilmeh; 380 pilli, pipilmeh
